Description:
Quick update and lots of AI.

🔎 Looking for content on a particular topic? Search the channel. If I have something it will be there! 🤔 Due to the channel growth and number of people wanting help I no longer can answer or even read questions and they will just stay in the moderation queue never to be seen so please post questions to other sites like Reddit, Microsoft Community Hub etc.

▬▬▬▬▬▬ C H A P T E R S ⏰ ▬▬▬▬▬▬ 00:00 - Introduction 00:09 - New videos 00:46 - DCe and ECe v6 confidential VMs 02:08 - Azure Firewall Draft and Deploy 02:47 - Azure Databricks workspace network config update 03:25 - Azure Databricks Lakebase 04:08 - Grok 4.0 04:20 - Qwen3.5 medium model series 04:35 - OpenAI GPT-5.3 Chat in Foundry 05:15 - OpenAI GPT-5.4 in Foundry and GHCP 06:12 - Model use and integration 07:41 - Phi-4-Reasoning-Vision 08:20 - Azure Arc Gateway 09:21 - Azure Policy faster enforcement 09:42 - Close
